resources.string: Start your journey with SAA 2025. Log in to explore!
You don\u2019t have permission to access this resource.
Live stream on Facebook Group Sun* Family

More than just a name, "Root Further" is the spirit that every Sun* member strives toward: always thinking deeply in every context and continuously creating, expanding oneself to overcome the limits previously set. Drawing on the metaphor of color theory, from just three primary colors — red, yellow, and blue — the infinite creativity of each individual can produce a near-unlimited palette of colors, with each shade representing boundless breakthrough and creativity.

Recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues — happening for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will roll out in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and gratitude on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as input for the Heads Council during the award selection process.

Kudos is a recognition message sent to a colleague for their contributions, efforts, or positive actions at work. It is a way for every Sun* member to show genuine and meaningful appreciation for one another.

The title should be concise and accurately reflect the recipient’s contribution. Choose positive, specific words that align with Sun* culture. Examples: "Inspiring leader", "Teamwork star", "Problem-solving expert".
Use hashtags to categorize Kudos by topic or Sun* value. Hashtags must start with # and contain no spaces. Examples: #teamwork, #innovation, #leadership, #customer_focus.

Do not use offensive, discriminatory, or personally critical language. Do not share sensitive personal information. Do not send Kudos for commercial or advertising purposes. Violating content will be removed and the account may be restricted.

You may choose to send Kudos anonymously. When this option is enabled, your name will not be shown to the recipient; however, the Organizing Committee can still view sender information to ensure compliance with community standards.
